15.text:
I believe in God the Father Almighty, Maker of heaven and earth.
          ( Gen. 1:1 ; Matt. 6:9 ) And in Jesus Christ, his only Son, our Lord; ( John 3:16 ; Rom. 1:4 ) who was conceived by the Holy

16.text: In the institution of baptism, which saith: Go ye, therefore, and teach all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father, and of the Son, and of the Holy Ghost. He that believeth and is baptized

Our churches teach that Baptism is necessary to salvation, and that through Baptism is offered the grace of God; and that children are to be baptized who, being offered to God through Baptism, are rec

15.text: Moreover, it is the promise of the gospel that whoever believes in Christ crucified shall not perish but have eternal life. This promise, together with the command to repent and believe, ought to be a
Repentance unto life is an evangelical grace, the doctrine whereof is to be preached by every minister of the Gospel, as well as that of faith in Christ.
